item.name: Dhalmel Whistle
item.description: This appropriately lengthy wind pipe calls a dhalmel loping to your side.

mount.name: Dhalmel
mount.action: Summon forth your dhalmel, a towering herbivore native to the Sea of Clouds.
mount.description: While attempting to nibble at a tree on a nearby isle, this dhalmel lost its footing and fell. As it plunged towards certain death, the fervent desire to live awakened its latent ability to harness the wind, and thus did it soar to safety. This may or may not have happened, but let's say it did.
mount.tooltip:
You've never seen
a dhalmel before!?
- Atelloune
